message:
fix(net): implement TCP accept storm detection with exponential backoff

Add AcceptStormState tracking and InterestRegistrationMode enum to
detect and mitigate accept() storms that cause CPU spin under high
connection pressure.

- Track consecutive WouldBlock events within a 25ms window to detect
  accept storms
- Implement exponential backoff (2ms base, 32ms cap) when storm is
  detected in reactor-armed mode
- Fallback to 4ms polling interval in reactor-less contexts
- Graceful handling when no reactor is available (e.g., testing or
  single-threaded environments)
- Methods: note_accept_would_block(), reset_accept_storm()

Prevents runaway CPU usage on listeners receiving high connection rates
or experiencing spurious epoll wakeups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
